project_identity.name: WM Finance
project_identity.description: A high-precision financial dashboard for a Polish manufacturing business (Greenhouses, Saunas, Hot Tubs). Prioritizes data clarity, speed, and trusted aesthetic.

usage_rules.headings: Use Manrope for all page titles and section headers.
usage_rules.numbers: Use JetBrains Mono for all currency values, dates, and account numbers to ensure tabular alignment.
usage_rules.ui_text: Use Inter for labels, buttons, and navigation.

layout.grid_system: Use the 'High Density Grid' (Mode B) for dashboards.

sidebar.behavior: Fixed on desktop, drawer on mobile.

containers.card: bg-card border border-border rounded-xl shadow-none hover:border-primary/20 transition-colors duration-300

cards.style: Flat, 1px border, no shadow in dark mode.
cards.header_style: flex flex-row items-center justify-between space-y-0 pb-2

charts.tooltip: bg-popover/90 backdrop-blur-md border border-border text-popover-foreground rounded-lg shadow-xl

badges.style: rounded-md px-2 py-1 text-xs font-medium ring-1 ring-inset

glassmorphism.usage: Use for sticky headers, dropdowns, and modal overlays.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the layout with a fixed sidebar (Adesk style) and a top header for mobile trigger/user profile.
Use 'Intl.NumberFormat' for Polish Złoty (PLN) formatting: '36 292,00 zł'. Space as thousand separator.
Ensure all text is in Russian as requested.
Use Skeleton loaders for all data fetching states. NO SPINNERS.
Default to Dark Mode. Add a toggle in Settings, but ensure Dark Mode is the primary design target.
For the 'Business Directions', always use the specific color badges defined in the 'colors.business_directions' section.
In the Transaction List, visually distinguish Income (Green) vs Expense (Red) using the semantic colors.
Use the 'sonner' library for all toast notifications.
Ensure the Dashboard uses the 'Bento Grid' (Mode B) layout for maximum data density.
Use 'lucide-react' for icons. Pick consistent line-weight icons.
All interactive elements MUST have 'data-testid' attributes.
universal_guidelines: Do not use generic centered layouts. Use high-density grids.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) for floating elements.
NEVER use 'transition: all'. Animate specific properties.
Every interaction needs micro-animations (hover, active, focus).
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable inside containers, but keep grids tight.
